mapper.select: SELECT ps.id, ps.mode, ps.subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, ps.topic_id, ps.scope_title, REPLACE(CAST(ps.started_at AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS started_at, REPLACE(CAST(ps.finished_at AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS finished_at, ps.question_count, ps.correct_count FROM practice_session ps INNER JOIN subject s ON s.id = ps.subject_id WHERE ps.id = #{sessionId} AND ps.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT q.id, q.topic_id, t.name AS topic_name, q.type, q.stem, q.explanation FROM practice_session ps INNER JOIN practice_session_question psq ON psq.session_id = ps.id INNER JOIN question q ON q.id = psq.question_id INNER JOIN topic t ON t.id = q.topic_id WHERE ps.id = #{sessionId} AND ps.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY psq.position_index ASC

SELECT CAST(question_option.id AS CHAR) AS id, CAST(question_option.question_id AS CHAR) AS question_id, question_option.option_key, question_option.content FROM practice_session ps INNER JOIN practice_session_question psq ON psq.session_id = ps.id INNER JOIN question_option ON question_option.question_id = psq.question_id WHERE ps.id = #{sessionId} AND ps.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY psq.position_index ASC, question_option.sort_order ASC, question_option.option_key ASC

SELECT ps.id, ps.mode, ps.topic_id, ps.scope_title, s.name AS subject_name, ps.question_count, ps.correct_count, REPLACE(CAST(ps.started_at AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS started_at, REPLACE(CAST(ps.finished_at AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS finished_at FROM practice_session ps INNER JOIN subject s ON s.id = ps.subject_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(ps.finished_at, ps.started_at) DESC, ps.id DESC LIMIT 1
